SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers

Class BatchWorker

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.SwingWorker<Void,Void>
fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.workers.BatchWorker
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable, Future<Void>, RunnableFuture<Void>
public class BatchWorker extends SwingWorker<Void,Void>
Manages the creation of sub-workers (BatchFileWorker), for processing the files from a given output directory.
Ends by merging results and exporting them to a newly created global '.csv'.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class javax.swing.SwingWorker

  • Constructor Details

    • BatchWorker

      public BatchWorker(LDCService ldcPlugin, File inputDirectory, File outputFile, BatchWindow bw)
      Creates a BatchWorker.
      Parameters:
      ldcPlugin - The LDC plugin, used within BatchFileWorker for the API calls.
      inputDirectory - The input directory where it has to find '.tif' and '.tiff' files.
      outputFile - The output '.csv' where it writes the results.
      bw - A reference to the BatchWindow creating this worker, needed to update the progress bar. Can be null.

  • Method Details

    • doInBackground

      protected Void doInBackground() throws Exception
      Specified by:
      doInBackground in class SwingWorker<Void,Void>
      Throws:
      Exception

    • getAllTifFiles

      private List<File> getAllTifFiles(File directory)
      Gets all '.tif' and '.tiff' files from the given directory.
      Parameters:
      directory - The directory in which we recursively search for input files.
      Returns:
      The list of '.tif' and '.tiff' inside the directory.

    • mergeResults

      private void mergeResults(ij.measure.ResultsTable global, ij.measure.ResultsTable toAdd)
      Merges a toAdd table into a global table.
      Parameters:
      global - The destination table.
      toAdd - Its content will be added at the end of global.

    • cancelAllTasks

      private void cancelAllTasks()
      Cancels all running BatchFileWorker tasks and futures.

    • calculateSummaryStatistics

      private void calculateSummaryStatistics(ij.measure.ResultsTable rt)
      Calculates and fills summary statistics in the first 7 rows of the ResultsTable.
      Parameters:
      rt - The ResultsTable with placeholder rows 0-6 for statistics
